heroHeadline: DHS Shutdown Enters Day 44 — Longest in U.S. History — As ICE Holds 70,000+
heroSubtitle: Congress leaves on 2-week recess with no deal; 'No Kings' rallies draw 100,000+ in Minnesota; protesters breach Portland ICE gate; 46 deaths in ICE custody since Jan 2025; Senate passed DHS bill excluding ICE but House rejected it
footerNote: Data sourced from DHS, ICE official records, ACLU, HRW, DHS OIG, TRAC Reports, Detention Watch Network, court records, and Congressional records
